stemHtml: A MPL (Multi-Crew Pilot License) gives you the right to…

options.a: Act as co-pilot in an aircraft which requires a co-pilot.
options.b: Act as co-pilot in an aircraft with MTOM above 2.7 tonnes.
options.c: Act as co-pilot in an aircraft which weighs over 5.7 tonnes.
options.d: Act as PIC of any aircraft.
